content: Mock chained method calls require explicit return_value assignment at each level — use mock_db.query.return_value.filter.return_value.first.return_value instead of mock_db.query().filter().first() to properly set up the mock chain behavior
Never change frameworks (FastAPI to Flask) without implementing the complete backend — switching requires implementing all routes, models, and app setup before templates will function
Never commit Python cache files (__pycache__) to version control — add them to .gitignore to keep repository clean
Always verify all imported modules and dependencies exist before referencing them — missing files like database.py, models.py, schemas.py cause critical import errors and application failures
Test files should not be truncated mid-function or contain only backticks — incomplete files cause syntax errors and break test runs
Always implement security protections including CSRF tokens on forms/HTMX requests and XSS escaping for user content — use Flask-WTF protection and template escaping like {{ content|e }}
Implement foundational layers before dependent components — create models, services, and backend endpoints before writing tests or frontend code that depends on them
Validate data integrity constraints at the model level — enforce business rules like preventing negative durations in the model rather than just testing for them
Always verify import paths match actual module structure — Base should be imported from models module, not database module, and use relative imports consistently
Maintain essential dependencies for framework functionality — removing core dependencies like pytest, httpx, pydantic, and alembic breaks testing and FastAPI capabilities
Implement pagination on GET endpoints that return collections — missing limit/offset parameters on collection endpoints could cause performance issues with large datasets
Test public interface methods rather than private methods — avoid testing private methods directly and instead test them through public methods that use them
Use FastAPI lifespan context manager instead of deprecated @app.on_event('startup') for FastAPI 0.104.1+ — the on_event decorators are being phased out
Never use CORS allow_origins=['*'] in production code — either use specific origins or make CORS configuration environment-dependent for security
Use proper foreign key relationships in tests instead of hardcoded IDs — hardcoded values like venue_id=1, concert_id=1 don't test actual relationships and will fail with real database constraints
Quality gate failures occurred — e2e_tests: 0/6 passed, coverage: 0% (threshold: 70%)
